title: Report envelope (monedula-acl-rbac report --format json)
description: Envelope that wraps a plan with an outer schema_version. The inner `plan` field is a plan.v1.json document; cross-file validation is left to the caller (inline a permissive object here so this schema validates standalone).

plan.description: Plan body. Conforms to plan.v1.json — kept open here so this schema can be used without resolving cross-file refs. Validate the plan body separately against plan.v1.json if you need stricter checking.
